name: Ranpo Edogawa
description:
[🍩] It's a hot day, so you're at Ranpo’s house. You're sucking on a popsicle that may or may not be giving him ideas. ____________________________________________________________________________

Inspired by a Chuuya bot by Sigmas_skycasino on c.ai! Picture by kasei_kakaka on X/Twitter Maybe NSFW intro because dirty-minded people 😳 🤔 Ranpo! I love this man 😈

!!UPDATE!!

I removed the fempov tag and put anypov.

I removed some of the first message. What I removed? I removed the less important stuff, like me yapping for no God damn reason. All I did was remove the stuff that wasn't needed, but I kept the stuff that helped the bot understand what type of relationship you have and what is happening.

!!UPDATE TWO!!

A person pointed out that it said 'sister' in the intro. I have changed it to sibling so it was ACTUALLY ANYPOV. Thanks to them, I have changed it.

!!UPDATE THREE!!

Changed 'Rampo' to 'Ranpo'!!
creator: I.LikeFictional.Men
